title: Lead Import (CR-C): duplicate review + merge workflow (possible_duplicate -> resolve/merge)
business_reason: CR-A skips duplicates and records them in duplicate_report. duplicate_policy supports a review lifecycle (duplicate_statuses: unchecked, possible_duplicate, confirmed_duplicate, not_duplicate, merged, ignored) with merge_allowed + merge_requires_reason + merged_lead_preserves_history, and auto_block_conversion_when_confirmed_duplicate. CR-C lets staff review and merge instead of silently skipping.

planned_scope.duplicate_status: Set school_leads.duplicate_status to possible_duplicate on import collision (instead of skip) so the row surfaces for review.
planned_scope.review_actions: resolve as not_duplicate (keep both) / confirmed_duplicate / merged; merge requires a reason (P1.8) and preserves history (merged_lead_preserves_history); interactions re-parent on merge.
planned_scope.conversion_guard: auto_block_conversion_when_confirmed_duplicate — convert action blocked while duplicate_status = confirmed_duplicate (P3.11).
planned_scope.ui: a duplicate-review surface (filter/facet on duplicate_status) reusing the toolbar + a merge action.

security_owasp: A09: merge audited with reason + original snapshot
concurrency: two merges of the same pair -> one wins, both audited
